title: tetraneuris brandegeei
intro: Tetraneuris brandegeei, also known as Brandegee's yellow paintbrush or Brandegee's desert marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as colds, fever, and respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Tetraneuris brandegeei are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help in relieving coughs, sore throats, and other respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
